title: [CODEREVIEW pass 3.3] HEAP default dead code reference
description: lichen/boards/elecrow/thinknode_m7/Kconfig.defconfig:5 - HEAP_MEM_POOL_ADD_SIZE_BOARD default is unconditional; t_deck uses conditional defaults based on LVGL/WIFI/BT to avoid dead code paths.
